name: Eschaton Brigade Solutions
author: Alexander Layton (Eschatonius)
description: Adds the Eschaton Brigade Solutions (EBS) manufacturer and seven new frames: GALLOWGLASS, VARANGI, PURBIYA, MYROI, IKKI, MEDJAY, and MARMETINE. "When a whole world is against you, end it."

changes: Initial release: EBS manufacturer, 7 frames with art, full license trees.
Weapon on-attack/on-hit/on-crit effects converted to v3 Effect Objects with save, status, and damage automation.
Grenades, mines, and tech actions carry structured damage/status data for Active Mode automation.
Added license display names to all licensed equipment.
